title: Vietnamese Freekeh Noodles
description: A salty and crunchy Vietnamese dish featuring freekeh, perfect for a hangover cure, made with plant-based friendly ingredients.
instructions: Rinse the freekeh in a fine mesh sieve and drain well.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is lightly browned and crispy.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
Add the cooked freekeh to the skillet or wok and stir to combine with the onion and mushroom mixture.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sesame oil.
Pour the sauce over the freekeh mixture and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the freekeh noodles to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions or sesame seeds, if desired.
